# TikTok Shop API: Search FBT Inventory Record

# Implement Search FBT Inventory Record API

## Purpose & Use Cases
API gets warehouse inventory change records. Use to sync stock levels. Use to audit inventory changes. Use to track stock movement.

## Endpoint
* Method: `POST`
* URL: `https://open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com/fbt/202410/inventory_records/search`

## Headers & Authentication
* `content-type`: `application/json`
* `x-tts-access-token`: Seller access token. Get from
